title: Cabinet Approves Rs 28,840 Crore 'Modified UDAN': A 10-Year Roadmap To Transform Regional Aviation By 2036
description: The Cabinet has approved a revamped UDAN scheme with a massive ₹28,840 crore outlay to boost regional air connectivity. Here's how it will impact affordable flying, Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities, and India's aviation sector. Cabinet Greenlights Rs 28,840 Crore "Modified UDAN": A 10-Year Roadmap to Transform Regional Aviation by 2036
